validation.summary: 30/30 focused tests pass; syntax check covers 93 JavaScript files and whitespace validation passes.
Two unchanged full-suite attempts outlived 300s and 420s external observation windows and completed after the caller lost the exit code; no assertion failure was observed.

review.evidence: The only implementation change centralizes the pre-existing CLI task inventory shape in the Kernel task module and reuses it from MCP. No operation, input, policy, state, effect, or compatibility surface changed; the inherited RED, focused regressions, and unchanged full suite all pass.

obligation_evidence.evidence: Task inventory projection now has one shared Kernel helper consumed by both adapters; no backend or authority was added.
The fix changes query output shape only and does not expand the 18-operation or low-risk mutation boundary.
